title: Use golangci-lint fmt for pkg/bindings
body:
golangci-lint v2 introduced a new command, fmt, which runs configured formatters (see `formatters` in `.golangci.yml`).

Use this for generated files. Drop separate goimports binary.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
NONE
```
